releaseNotes: v0.24.15 — Three improvements prompted by Alex's continued sync testing. (1) Activity log now shows an 'imported' badge on rows that arrived from a peer device, so you can tell at a glance which scans came from where. (2) Create-new-pharmacy now requires type-to-confirm ('CREATE NEW') when local inventory exists — designed to prevent accidental duplicate pharmacies on the server when you actually meant to Join. (3) Sync Diagnostics screen has a new 'Sync health' panel showing pending push count, last successful sync time, and last error — answers 'is sync actually working right now?' at a glance.
